chapter_title.en: Chapter 21 – The Penalty (Hadd) regarding the sodomy

text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ وُجِدَ رَجُلٌ مَعَ رَجُلٍ فِي إِمَارَةِ عُمَرَ فَهَرَبَ أَحَدُهُمَا وَ أُخِذَ الْآخَرُ فَجِي‏ءَ بِهِ إِلَى عُمَرَ فَقَالَ لِلنَّاسِ مَا تَرَوْنَ قَالَ فَقَالَ هَذَا اصْنَعْ كَذَا وَ قَالَ هَذَا اصْنَعْ كَذَا قَالَ فَقَالَ مَا تَقُولُ يَا أَبَا الْحَسَنِ قَالَ اضْرِبْ عُنُقَهُ فَضَرَبَ عُنُقَهُ

قَالَ ثُمَّ أَرَادَ أَنْ يَحْمِلَهُ فَقَالَ مَهْ إِنَّهُ قَدْ بَقِيَ مِنْ حُدُودِهِ شَيْ‏ءٌ قَالَ أَيُّ شَيْ‏ءٍ بَقِيَ قَالَ ادْعُ بِحَطَبٍ قَالَ فَدَعَا عُمَرُ بِحَطَبٍ فَأَمَرَ بِهِ أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) فَأُحْرِقَ بِهِ .

en.hubeali: Abu Ali Al Ashary, from Al Hassan Bin Ali Al Kufy, from Al Abbas Bin Aamir, from Sayf Bin Umeyra, from Abdul Rahman Al Arzamy who said,

‘I heard Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> saying: ‘A man was found to be with a man during the emirate of Umar. So one of them fled and the other one was seized. So they came with him to Umar. So he said to the people, ‘What are you opining?’ So this one said, ‘Do this’, and this one said, ‘Do this’. So he said, ‘What are you<sup>asws</sup> saying, O Abu Al Hassan<sup>asws</sup>!’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Strike his neck off’. So he had his neck struck off’.

Heasws said: ‘Then he intended that he be carried away, so heasws said: ‘Wait! There still remains something outstanding from his Penalty (Hadd)’. Heasws said: ‘Call for the firewood!’ Heasws said: ‘So Umar called for the firewood, and Amir Al-Momineenasws ordered for him to be incinerated by it’.
